message:
test(core): add bulk file creation and lookup test

Add `create_many_files_then_lookup_all` test that creates 250 files in a
subdirectory and verifies every file can be looked up by name. This
exercises the directory entry storage path under moderate fan-out to
catch regressions in create/lookup round-tripping across hash-tree
directory blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
